items.name: Fried Sam Xin Chicken Dumplings
items.description: 18 pieces deep-fried in a golden flower shape. Our signature — crispy edges, juicy centre. Served with chilli oil.

items.name: Fried Beef Dumplings
items.description: Pan-fried to golden perfection. 16 pieces with minced beef, spring onion, and ginger.

items.name: Fried Lamb Dumplings
items.description: 16 pieces with seasoned lamb and cumin. Pan-fried until the bottoms are crisp and caramelised.

items.name: Steamed Lamb Gyoza
items.description: 16 pieces of soft, pillowy lamb dumplings. Steamed until translucent and tender.

items.name: Steamed Chicken Dumplings
items.description: 16 pieces with minced chicken, chives, and a touch of sesame oil. Light and comforting.

items.name: Steamed Beef Dumplings
items.description: 16 pieces. The beef filling stays juicy inside the delicate steamed wrapper.

items.name: Boiled Chicken Dumplings in Soup
items.description: 16 pieces served in a light, fragrant chicken broth with spring onion and coriander.

items.name: Boiled Beef Dumplings in Soup
items.description: 16 pieces in a warming beef broth. Perfect for rainy evenings.

items.name: Boiled Lamb Dumplings in Soup
items.description: 16 pieces in a rich lamb broth with goji berries and ginger. A northern Chinese classic.

items.name: Braised Chicken Kuan Xin Noodles
items.description: Hand-pulled flat noodles in a rich braised chicken sauce with potatoes and peppers. A PV128 favourite.

items.name: La Mian Beef Soup
items.description: Fresh hand-pulled noodles in a clear beef broth with sliced beef, radish, and coriander.

items.name: Mutton Vermicelli
items.description: Glass noodles in a hearty mutton soup with preserved vegetables and spring onion.

items.name: Cumin Lamb Skewers (4 pcs)
items.description: Grilled lamb skewers rubbed with cumin, chilli, and Sichuan pepper. A Xinjiang street-food classic.

items.name: Braised Mutton with Noodles
items.description: Tender braised mutton served over hand-pulled noodles in a rich, aromatic gravy.

items.name: Sea Cucumber Rice
items.description: Fragrant jasmine rice topped with braised sea cucumber, mushrooms, and a savoury gravy.

items.name: Garlic Prawns with Rice
items.description: Wok-fried prawns with garlic and spring onion, served with steamed jasmine rice.

items.name: Free Flow Chinese Tea
items.description: Complimentary refills. Jasmine, chrysanthemum, or pu-erh. Served hot.

items.name: Hawthorn Plum Juice
items.description: Sweet-tart Chinese hawthorn juice. Refreshing and aids digestion after a dumpling feast.

items.name: Soy Milk (Hot or Cold)
items.description: Fresh homemade soy milk. Silky, lightly sweetened. A northern Chinese breakfast staple.
